name: Downing FOUR VCT plc
summary: Downing FOUR VCT plc is a venture capital trust (VCT) that invests in a diverse portfolio of smaller UK businesses. The company aims to provide investors with tax-free dividends and capital growth by investing in early-stage and growth companies. Downing FOUR VCT plc is managed by Downing LLP and is based in London, United Kingdom.
